_backup_info.reason: spread_033 per-spread analysis was based on incorrect VLM output (Qwen3-VL misidentified rotated content)
_backup_info.note: Gemini-2.5-pro correctly identified the image as a human eye and noted the rotation, but this was not propagated

images.subject: An abstracted, extreme close-up photograph of a human eye.
images.composition: Extreme close-up that renders the subject abstract.

contemporary_plan.theme: The Earth layer: what computation costs the ground
contemporary_plan.argument: The original's dark landscape image evoked nature as the ground beneath all human media. The contemporary version shows what computation has done to that ground.
